examples: My phone went off during the meeting.
The yogurt went off before the expiration date.
The bomb went off in the building.
The food went off in the heat.
The alarm went off at 6 AM.
The fire alarm went off unexpectedly.
Don't eat that meat — it's gone off.
What time does your alarm go off?
How can you tell if it's gone off?
example_translate: Мой телефон сработал во время встречи.
Не ешь это мясо — оно испортилось.
go off.synonyms:
Срабатывать (о сигнализации, будильнике) - activate, sound, ring
Портиться (о еде) - spoil, rot, go bad
